We power customer conversations for 40% of Shopify brands
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Read case study
Get to know Gorgias
Built for brands that know every conversation counts.
Automate routine tickets and personalize the rest.
AI Agent trained on your brand
One conversation. Everywhere.
One unified inbox across every channel, with live Shopify data and full customer context built into every conversation.
High-quality answers. Measurable results.
Engage. Guide. Convert.
8.83× ROI
“The AI upsells with a conversational tone that feels genuinely helpful, not pushy. It asks the right follow-up questions and improves AOV. It’s exactly how we train our human agents.”
AI Agent + Helpdesk
AI Agent + Helpdesk, built as one.
Most brands bolt third-party AI onto a generic helpdesk. Gorgias unifies AI and the inbox in a single platform, so agents and automation share context, resulting in faster, more accurate responses.
Explore the platform
One AI Agent. Pre-sale to post-sale.
Learn more
->
Pre-trained on 1B+ conversations
Understands ecommerce, Shopify data, and customer intent from day one
Your rules. Your AI.
Apply your tone, policies, and SOPs with built-in guardrails
Automate 60% of support
Resolve inquiries automatically so your team can focus on high-impact work
AI coaching, built in
Proactive, real-time tips help agents improve with every conversation
Proactive, not reactive AI
Engage shoppers at the right moment with the right recommendations
Knows when to escalate to your team
Seamless hand-offs to human agents with context
One inbox. Full store context.
Learn more
->
One omnichannel inbox
Email, chat, SMS, WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook in one view
In-conversation actions
Cancel, discount, or upsell directly inside the conversation
Native Shopify integration
Pull up any order, customer, or product without leaving the ticket
300+ integrations
Recharge, Klaviyo, Yotpo, and more connected out of the box
Team collaboration
Route, assign, and manage tickets across your team
Revenue attribution reporting
See exactly how much revenue your support team generates
Customer stories
Our customers say it best
Every conversation is a revenue opportunity. Here's the proof.
19.2x
ROI on AI-driven sales interactions
56%
automation rate in <2 months
10%
reduction in total cost of ownership
$500M+
revenue driven through conversations
17,000+
ecommerce brands powered globally
4.2x
average return on investment
50 in 50 program
We help you get to 50% in 50 days.
Today
Connect your channels
Connect your channels, migrate your data, and get your team up and running with implementation resources that guide the way.
Day 7
Launch in 1 week
Start resolving tickets immediately with full Shopify context, knowledge, and workflows in place.
Day 21
Automate at scale
AI Agent handles the repetitive tickets filling up the queue, so your team can spend their time where it matters most.
Day 50
Drive measurable revenue
Turn high-intent moments into measurable revenue by engaging shoppers, increasing basket size, and giving each visitor the confidence to convert.
"When we first started with Gorgias, our goal was to hit 30% automation in 30 days. We surpassed that and are now above 50% automation, and we’re still climbing."
Courtney Bajek
Customer Service Lead at Orthofeet
Read the full story
->
Backed by the best
The most trusted names in AI and ecommerce choose Gorgias. Now you can too.
OpenAI Partner
Built on a direct OpenAI partnership. Deeper model access. AI fine-tuned for product recommendations, order management, and brand voice. A real integration.
Built into Shopify’s DNA
Shopify-invested. Orders, customers, and store data live inside Gorgias natively. One click to install. Zero data syncing.
Platform stability
Zero downtime during peak season. Handles high volumes and holiday surges without dropping a single conversation.
Continuous innovation
Commerce-first development. Every feature based on how Shopify brands actually work.
Deepest integrations
300+ integrations. Klaviyo, Recharge, Yotpo, and your entire stack. One click.
Protected investment
Scales with you. From 100 tickets a month to 100,000. Same platform.
Get started today
Sign up free
Book a demo
Protect your team from BFCM burnout
OSEA, a Gorgias customer known for iconic body care and standout CX, has a gift waiting for you.
Claim your gift card
Looking for other resources?
Explore webinars, help articles, and community insights to go even deeper.

Voice and SMS,when you need them.
Add Voice or SMS to any plan. Pricing scales with your call and text volume, so you can choose the tier that matches your usage.

Book a demo
All your favourite apps, connected
Connect 100+ apps to empower your team with AI and automation, share customer data between tools, and make updates in other apps — all from within Gorgias.
Thank you! Your submission has been received!
Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.
411Gen Influencer Commerce
Launch mini stores for you brand powered by Gorgias
Ada
With Ada, you can invite your marketing, sales and support teams to collaborate in a holistic CX strategy across the pre and post-purchase journeys to save costs, increase revenue, and drive brand loyalty.
Address Guard
View the shipping address validation status per ticket
AfterShip Returns Center
Return Label, Store Credit, Exchange, Return Policy, Refunds.
AfterShip Tracking
Proactive shipment tracking, reduces WISMO tickets.
AgentsOnly
On-demand gig platform to manage your customer support needs.
AI Agent by My AskAI
Easily add an affordable AI agent to resolve support tickets.
AI Agents by Eesel
Get an AI support rep in Gorgias in a few clicks.
Aide: Agentic AI CX & Support
Deliver Exceptional AI Customer Experiences.
Aircall
Increase productivity and efficiency, get more insights.
Aissist.io
Agentic AI to automate Service and Sales.
Alloy Automation
Easy store automation.
Amphora
Smart logistics for your e-commerce.
Answerbase
Answerbase recognizes when Gorgias chat is available and gives users the option to chat.
Argoid Upsell Cross-sell AI
Personalize with real-time AI product recommendations
ARPU
Improve CX. Increase LTV. Reduce Churn.
Asyntai AI Agent
Affordable AI Agent for Gorgias.
Attentive
Respond to Attentive SMS conversations in Gorgias
Audmate
Show loyalty points, referral url, VIP tier next to tickets.
Autopilot
Customer journey marketing, data and analytics platform
Awtomic Subscriptions
The ultimate repeat purchase platform.
Baback Returns
Returns managed.
Base44 Integration
Build custom internal tools with your Gorgias data.
Bigblue
Track Bigblue orders in Gorgias
BigCommerce
Connect your BigCommerce store to Gorgias to support shoppers instantly with customers' order history and information at your agents' fingertips.
Bloomreach
All-in-one platform for data, marketing, AI, and analytics.
BLOY Rewards Program & Loyalty
Boost sales via loyalty program, loyalty points, referral, VIP.
Brightpearl by Sage
Enhance customer service with Gorgias & Brightpearl by Sage.
Bulk Discount Code Bot
Shopify discount code lookup and unique coupon generator.
Call Hippo
CallHippo is an on-demand Voice-over-Internet Protocol (VoIP) Service Provider.
CartConvert
Checkout recovery.
Certainly
Certainly is a Conversational AI chatbot platform made especially for eCommerce, that enables DTC eCommerce brands to increase sales and improve customer experience.
ChannelReply
ChannelReply lets you support Amazon, eBay, Walmart, Etsy, Back Market & Newegg customers from inside Gorgias.
Chargeflow
Automated Chargeback Management and Prevention.
ChargePay
Recover Lost Revenue & Fight Chargebacks Automatically.
Chat Aid
AI powered answers with your company's data.
Chatdesk
Chatdesk provides US-based superfans of your brand who deliver personalized and on-demand support (e.g., social moderation, pre-sale questions, order status) across Facebook/IG/TikTok, email, and chat.
ClientZen
Tickets & Feedback analyses.
Cloudtalk
Streamline communication with your customers
Clyde
Offer product protection, drive revenue
Coco AI
A WhatsApp AI sales agent. Recover more carts. Send Campaigns.
Composio
Integrations Platform for AI Agents.
Conduit
Conduit handles moving data from Gorgias to your spreadsheet
Consio
Consio: Phone & AI Voice Agent.
Copilot by TalentPop
AI-crafted replies in Gorgias you team can review and send.
Corso Post Purchase
The entire Corso Post-Purchase Platform in a Gorgias widget
CraftCX
Measure and improve your AI-led customer experience.
Daasity Analytics
Centralize data across your tech stack and get useful insights
Daton
Replicate Gorgias data to your data warehouse in minutes
Dedication Agents
AI Meets HI - Customer Service Melding The Best Of Both Worlds
Deliverlitics
Know your customers and provide personalized CX.
Deriskly
Generate Contextual replies using AI
Digioh
Collect & Convert with Digioh Quizzes, Pop-Ups, & Surveys.
DigitalGenius
Automated AI for eCommerce Customer Service
Dondy
AI-powered WhatsApp marketing and support for Shopify stores.
Dotdigital
Connect marketing and support to deliver relevant experiences

analysis.name: Gorgias
analysis.tagline: Conversations that drive revenue, not just resolutions.
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered helpdesk for ecommerce that unifies support, sales, and shopper engagement in one inbox trained on your brand.
analysis.target_segment: SMB to mid-market ecommerce, with enterprise tier for largest Shopify brands
analysis.ideal_customer: Shopify (and other ecommerce platform) DTC brands looking to automate support and drive revenue from customer conversations

differentiators: AI Agent + Helpdesk unified as a single platform, not third-party AI bolted onto a generic helpdesk
Pre-trained on 1B+ ecommerce conversations, understands Shopify data on day one
Powers customer conversations for 40% of Shopify brands
Priced per ticket volume and per AI resolution, never per agent (unlimited seats)
Built specifically for ecommerce/DTC brands vs generic helpdesk
Revenue attribution reporting — proves support drives sales, not just resolutions
50 in 50 onboarding program guaranteeing 50% automation in 50 days

recent_ships.source: AI coaching, built in — Proactive, real-time tips help agents improve with every conversation

recent_ships.source: Voice — Support by phone, from your helpdesk

praised: 'The AI upsells with a conversational tone that feels genuinely helpful, not pushy. It asks the right follow-up questions and improves AOV.'
8.83× ROI and 19.2x ROI on AI-driven sales interactions reported by customers
'When we first started with Gorgias, our goal was to hit 30% automation in 30 days. We surpassed that and are now above 50%' — Orthofeet
56% automation rate achieved in under 2 months by some customers
10% reduction in total cost of ownership cited
complaints: HN activity on Gorgias is minimal; no direct product complaints surfaced in HN feed
G2 reviews page was blocked/not scrapable — sentiment signal missing

free_tier.limits: Sign up free option available; specific caps not disclosed on pricing page

tiers.name: Helpdesk (volume-based, 50-5,000 tickets/mo)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Helpdesk scales by ticket volume (50–5,000/mo), unlimited agents, AI Agent included

tiers.name: AI Agent (usage-based add-on/included)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pay only when AI resolves a conversation; included on every plan

tiers.name: Voice add-on
tiers.headline_inclusions: Voice add-on; pricing scales with call volume

tiers.name: SMS add-on
tiers.headline_inclusions: SMS add-on; pricing scales with text volume

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: For largest Shopify brands — book a demo

pricing.notes: Pricing page shows tier structure but hides specific dollar amounts behind 'compare plans' interaction; plans are priced by ticket volume (not per agent), AI Agent charged per resolved conversation, Voice/SMS are usage-based add-ons scaling with call/text volume
